code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut evens_count = 0
mut odds_count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
mut has_digits = false

while i <= n
  mut b = 32
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  end

  if not is_ws(b)
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      value = 0
      has_digits = false
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
      else
        value = b - 48
        has_digits = true
      end
    else
      value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digits = true
    end
  else
    if in_num and has_digits
      let num = value * sign
      let s = "#{num}"
      if num % 2 == 0
        if evens_count == 0
          evens = s
        else
          evens = "#{evens} #{s}"
        end
        evens_count = evens_count + 1
      else
        if odds_count == 0
          odds = s
        else
          odds = "#{odds} #{s}"
        end
        odds_count = odds_count + 1
      end
    end
    in_num = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
